description: Declarative WooCommerce REST CRUD payload fixture catalog for route-family planning. These fixtures describe intended product, order, customer, and coupon payload shapes for a generic isolated REST mutation runner and generate WP Codebox fixture-plan/REST opt-in artifacts; they do not make those mutations executable or proven.

readiness.coverage_contract: Payload fixtures are static Woo-owned declarations only. The product batch PHP workload remains separate executable coverage, but this generic fixture-plan contract stays declared until the generic REST mutation runner consumes WP Codebox fixture plans and emits mutation isolation, delete-boundary, and reviewer-facing evidence artifacts.

required_refs: reviewer-facing generic REST mutation runner run id
reviewer-facing mutation isolation contract artifact ref
reviewer-facing delete-boundary artifact ref before delete is executable

upstream_blockers: Generic REST mutation runner must consume wp-codebox/fuzz-fixture-plan/v1 and wp-codebox/rest-mutation-fixture-opt-in/v1 artifacts generated from these Woo declarations.
Generic REST mutation runner must emit mutation isolation artifacts for create/update before any declarative fixture family becomes executable.
Generic REST mutation runner must emit delete-boundary mutation artifacts before delete fixtures become executable.
Homeboy/WP Codebox must collect reviewer-facing artifact refs before this manifest can be promoted beyond declared readiness.

delete: fixture-owned product or variation id with delete-boundary artifact

blocked_operations.create: generic REST mutation runner has not consumed wp-codebox/fuzz-fixture-plan/v1 artifacts or emitted mutation isolation artifacts for product creates
blocked_operations.update: generic REST mutation runner has not consumed wp-codebox/fuzz-fixture-plan/v1 artifacts or emitted mutation isolation artifacts for product updates

delete: fixture-owned order id with delete-boundary artifact

blocked_operations.create: generic REST mutation runner has not accepted order payload fixtures
blocked_operations.update: generic REST mutation runner has not emitted mutation isolation artifacts for order updates

create: customer with unique email and username
delete: fixture-owned customer id with delete-boundary artifact

blocked_operations.create: generic REST mutation runner has not accepted customer payload fixtures
blocked_operations.update: generic REST mutation runner has not emitted mutation isolation artifacts for customer updates

create: fixed cart coupon with usage limits
delete: fixture-owned coupon id with delete-boundary artifact

blocked_operations.create: generic REST mutation runner has not accepted coupon payload fixtures
blocked_operations.update: generic REST mutation runner has not emitted mutation isolation artifacts for coupon updates
